title: Purdue students organize one of the world's largest hardware hackathons
summary_en: More than 750 hardware enthusiasts from 80 universities and 10 countries filled the Purdue University Armory during StarkHacks, a 36-hour hardware hackathon organized by Purdue's Humanoid Robot Club in April 2026.
title_cn: Purdue students organize one of the world's largest hardware hackathons

title: Inaugural cohort chosen for Bachelor’s to Doctorate in 7 Years program
summary_en: Purdue University's College of Engineering has selected the inaugural cohort of students for its new Bachelor's to Doctorate in 7 Years (B2D7) program, an accelerated, milestone-driven pathway designed to prepare exceptional undergraduates for advanced research careers and leadership in industry and national laboratories.
title_cn: Inaugural cohort chosen for Bachelor’s to Doctorate in 7 Years program

title: ABE's Engelberth, ECE's Zoltowski inducted into Purdue University Teaching Academy
summary_en: The Purdue University Teaching Academy has announced 11 inductees for 2026 in recognition of their outstanding and scholarly teaching in graduate, undergraduate or engagement programs.
title_cn: ABE's Engelberth, ECE's Zoltowski inducted into Purdue University Teaching Academy

title: Purdue University confers Tim Cahill (BSAEE '87, MSAAE '88) with honorary doctorate at spring ceremony
summary_en: Tim Cahill, president of Missiles and Fire Control (MFC) for Lockheed Martin Corp., received an honorary Doctor of Engineering from the College of Engineering during Thursday morning's Division I ceremony.
title_cn: Purdue University confers Tim Cahill (BSAEE '87, MSAAE '88) with honorary doctorate at spring ceremony

title: Purdue set to host second Tech Summit in Silicon Valley
summary_en: Registration is under way for the second College of Engineering Tech Summit, scheduled for Thursday, June 18, at the Computer History Museum in Mountain View, California.
title_cn: Purdue set to host second Tech Summit in Silicon Valley

title: NE's Behrman and BME's Krishnan named 2026 Goldwater Scholars
summary_en: The award is the nation's premier undergraduate scholarship for students studying the natural sciences, engineering and mathematics
title_cn: NE's Behrman and BME's Krishnan named 2026 Goldwater Scholars
